calendar.matters:
NAME CHANGE CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekeron. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported.

Jeffrey J. Chang, Esq. appeared for petitioners Xiaogang You and Zihan Zhou, who were not present for this morning's proceedings.
na Johnson were present in pro per with the minor, James Clayton Marsae Jones, III.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor from Zijie You to Zecheng You.

Decree Changing Name of the Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.
